info.title: Multimodal Embedding API
info.description: Generate text, image, or combined text+image embeddings using Voyage AI voyage-multimodal-3 model for vector search operations.

post.summary: Generate embedding vector for text, image, or both
post.description: Takes a text string, a base64-encoded image, or both, and returns an embedding vector suitable for MongoDB vector search. Use text for describing what you're looking for. Use image when the user provides a product image to find similar items.

text.description: Text to generate an embedding for (e.g., product description or search query)
text.example: red leather handbag with gold buckle

image.description: Base64-encoded image to generate an embedding for. Do not include the data URL prefix.

dimensions.description: Number of dimensions in the embedding

model.description: Model used to generate the embedding

input_type.description: Type of input used for embedding generation

400.description: Bad request - at least one of 'text' or 'image' is required
